headline.vsl_adaptation: Dr. Meir Shinitzky is a former visiting professor at Duke University and winner of the prestigious J.F. Kennedy Prize. He's authored more than 200 scientific papers. And now he's discovered a compound so powerful it's reported to repair... even regrow damaged brain cells...

lead.opening_verbatim: Dr. Meir Shinitzky, Ph.D., is a former visiting professor at Duke University, recipient of the prestigious J.F. Kennedy Prize and author of more than 200 international scientific papers on human body cells. But now he's come up with what the medical world considers his greatest accomplishment - A vital compound so powerful, it's reported to repair… even regrow damaged brain cells.
lead.transition_to_body: In layman's terms - Bring back your memory power.

mechanism.mechanism_description: Phosphatidylserine (PS) and phosphatidic acid are critical nutrients the body produces less of with age. PS feeds brain cells the vital nutrients needed, repairs membranes and molecules surrounding brain cells that act as transmitters connecting brain cells. Also lowers cortisol stress hormone. Works in as little as 30 minutes.

proof_elements.verbatim: former visiting professor at Duke University, recipient of the prestigious J.F. Kennedy Prize and author of more than 200 international scientific papers
17 different double blind studies with placebo controlled groups... 100% Success Rate
the ONLY Health Supplement that has a 'Qualified Health Claim for both Cognitive Dysfunction and Dementia'
After only 45 days there was a measurable improvement... After 90 days, there was an impressive and amazing improvement

key_sections.content_verbatim: Science has shown when your brain nutrient levels drop, you can start to experience memory problems and overall mental fatigue. Your ability to concentrate and stay focused becomes compromised. And gradually, a 'mental fog' sets in. It can damage every aspect of your life.

Scientists think the biggest cause of brain deterioration in older people is the decreased functioning of membranes and molecules that surround the brain cells. These really are the transmitters that connect the tissues or the brain cells to one another that help us with our sharp memory, clear thinking and mental focus.

17 different double blind studies with placebo controlled groups have been involved in the clinical research of PS with patients between the ages of 55-80 years of age. PS patients outperformed placebo patients in All 5 Tests - 100% Success Rate. After only 45 days there was a measurable improvement in mental function. After 90 days, there was an impressive and amazing improvement in mental function.

narrative_flow.fda_claim: Lipogen PS Plus is the ONLY Health Supplement that has a 'Qualified Health Claim for both Cognitive Dysfunction and Dementia'
narrative_flow.cortisol_benefit: PS helps to reduce everyday stress and elevate your mood by lowering your body's production of the hormone cortisol
narrative_flow.speed_of_results: enters your bloodstream fast (in as little as thirty minutes)

testimonial.quote: My Memory Started to Scare Me. I would forget all kinds of things and something that I just said earlier in the day would have completely slipped my mind. After about 6 weeks of taking it on a daily basis is when I began to notice that I wasn't forgetting things anymore. Thanks to PS for giving me my memory back.

offer.guarantee: If doesn't help you think better, remember more - you won't pay a penny (except S&H)
